overview.description: The PIMCO Short Term Municipal Bond Active ETF (SMMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides tax-exempt income through investment-grade short-term municipal bonds. SMMU was launched on Feb 1, 2010 and is issued by PIMCO.
